reviews.comment:
Una pachorra total para atender. Tienen dos vias para la carga una en cada sentido de circulación y como no respetan el orden de llegada mientras de un lado se hace una cola interminable del otro entra alguien y lo atienden al instante. Al shop le falta mucho para ser una estación que está sobre una ruta. No hay para comer mas que galletita, golosinas o facturas

(Translated by Google)
The service is incredibly slow. They have two charging lanes, one in each direction, and since they don't respect the order of arrival, while an endless queue forms on one side, someone else walks in on the other and is served instantly. The shop is far from what you'd expect from a service station on a highway. There's nothing to eat but cookies, candy, or pastries.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbEo3WGpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Chepes fue, es y seguirá siendo la posta para descanso y aprovisionamiento de quienes cruzan el llano riojano y sus habitantes.
El ACA y/o YPF deberían instalar allí una estación de servicios amplia, moderna y completa, como tantas otras que ofrecen en la Argentina.
Su personal es atento, buena onda.

(Translated by Google)
Chepes was, is, and will continue to be a rest and supply stop for those crossing the Riojan plains and its inhabitants.
The ACA and/or YPF should install a large, modern, and fully equipped service station there, like so many others they offer throughout Argentina. Their staff is attentive and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNd0x6LTVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Great service, the staff did a great job keeping up with the amount of cars coming.
The restrooms were clean, specially considering the amount of people that day.

reviews.comment:
La atencion del personal fue excelente! Lamentablemente había un solo empleado para todas las mesas y en el momento de mi visita habóa mucha gente (demora en atencion y un café para el olvido) internet?? No andaba. Repito, solo tienen las 3 estrellas por la amabilidad de sus empleados

(Translated by Google)
The staff's service was excellent! Unfortunately, there was only one employee for all the tables, and at the time of my visit, it was very busy (resulting in slow service and terrible coffee). The internet? It wasn't working. Again, they only have 3 stars because of the friendliness of their staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNM2VUV1pnEAE
